arts.ttl: Damning Hull City mid-season report gives Ilicali no margin for error in January
arts.sum: It was a familiar story for Hull City on Thursday as they lost for the seventh time away from home, going down to a 1-0 loss at Preston North End. There has been a huge lack of cohesion and chemistry throughout the season, so creating that will be one of the key jobs for Selles moving forward.
